CREATE TABLE points (list1 ARRAY<FLOAT>, list2 ARRAY<FLOAT>);
SELECT list_distance(list1, list2) FROM points WHERE list1 IS NOT NULL AND list2 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT list_distance(list1, list2) AS distance FROM points WHERE list1[1] < list2[1];
SELECT (SELECT list_distance(list1, list2) FROM points WHERE list1[1] = 1) AS distance FROM points LIMIT 1;
SELECT a.list1, b.list2, list_distance(a.list1, b.list2) AS distance FROM points a JOIN points b ON a.list1[1] < b.list2[1];
WITH distances AS (SELECT list_distance(list1, list2) AS distance FROM points) SELECT AVG(distance) FROM distances;
CREATE TABLE test_points AS SELECT list1, list2 FROM points WHERE list1[1] > 0 AND list2[1] > 0;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM points WHERE list_distance(list1, list2) < 2;
